name: Chania-Thika River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Industrial and informal settlement interests on riparian land
notes: Riparian buffer consistently violated by factories and informal settlement. NEMA and county have not coordinated enforcement since 2019.

name: Thika Industrial Zone Drainage
blocking_factor: Industrial lobby resistance to mandatory drainage standards
notes: Phase 1 drainage collector complete. Industrial effluent mixing with stormwater unresolved. NEMA environmental compliance separate from flood drainage.

name: Kiandutu Upgrading and Drainage
blocking_factor: Land tenure disputes in informal settlement
notes: SPA designation applied for 2021. Survey complete. Secure tenure prerequisite for drainage investment not resolved.

name: Thika Superhighway Flood Culvert Remediation
notes: Four undersized culverts under A2 highway replaced 2022. Downstream flooding in Makongeni reduced but not eliminated.

name: Upper Tana-Thika Early Warning Integration
notes: Gauge network on Chania and Thika rivers functional. 3-hour warning achievable. Sub-county emergency alert chain not tested since 2022.
